recentDishes.title: Bread Rolls (Cheese, Hotdog & Bell Pepper)
recentDishes.feedback: Easy to make — spread ketchup on bread, add cheese/hotdog/bell pepper, roll, dip in egg, coat in breadcrumbs, fry on low heat. Good for breakfast, snack, or dinner when skipping rice.
recentDishes.notes: Day off recipe. Comfort food. Fresh is best.

recentDishes.title: Beef Mechado
recentDishes.feedback: Planning this for Jordan's visit. Classic Filipino beef stew.
recentDishes.notes: Part of the welcome menu for Jordan's PH visit.

recentDishes.title: Lumpia (Green Beans, Carrots, Ground Pork)
recentDishes.feedback: Simple but delicious. Classic Filipino comfort food. Crispy and golden.
recentDishes.notes: Fish or chicken lumpia also works. Endless variations.

recentDishes.title: Garlic Butter Sweet Potatoes
recentDishes.feedback: Family loved it! Sweet potato was actually better.

recentDishes.title: Adobo Chicken Wings
recentDishes.feedback: Crispy twist was a hit. Jordan wants it again.

recentDishes.title: Pancit Canton Stir-Fry
recentDishes.feedback: Quick and easy. Good weeknight meal.

substitutionLog.notes: Not quite the same. Add lemon juice for tang.

mealPlan.description: Leftover adobo over fresh rice with pickled vegetables
Sour tamarind soup with pork — comfort food
Jordan's favorite — try the smoked paprika twist

captureLog.message: Christel made lumpia for dinner — green beans, carrots, ground pork. Simple but delicious. Classic Filipino comfort food.
Christel planning welcome menu for Jordan's PH visit: beef mechado, butter garlic shrimp, chicken adobo. Jordan is a man of good taste.
Christel's day off recipe: Bread rolls with cheese, hotdog, bell pepper. Spread ketchup, roll, dip in egg, coat in breadcrumbs, fry on low heat. Good for breakfast, snack, or dinner.
